lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੇ ਚਾਨਣ ਹੋਦਿਆਂ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ete chaanan hodiaan gur bin ghor andhaar |2|
lines.english: even with such light, there would still be pitch darkness without the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਚੰਦਾ ਉਗਵਹਿ ਸੂਰਜ ਚੜਹਿ ਹਜਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: je sau chandaa ugaveh sooraj charreh hajaar |
lines.english: If a hundred moons were to rise, and a thousand suns appeared,
Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੁਟੇ ਤਿਲ ਬੂਆੜ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੇ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਖੇਤ ॥
lines.translit: chhutte til booaarr jiau sunye andar khet |
lines.english: shall be left abandoned in the field, like the scattered sesame.
First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੂ ਨ ਚੇਤਨੀ ਮਨਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਸੁਚੇਤ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guroo na chetanee man aapanai suchet |
lines.english: O Nanak, those who do not think of the Guru, and who think of themselves as clever,

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲੀਅਹਿ ਫੁਲੀਅਹਿ ਬਪੁੜੇ ਭੀ ਤਨ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੁਆਹ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: faleeeh fuleeeh bapurre bhee tan vich suaah |3|
lines.english: The wretches bear fruit and flower, but within their bodies, they are filled with ashes. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਛੁਟਿਆ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਉ ਨਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: khetai andar chhuttiaa kahu naanak sau naah |
lines.english: They are abandoned in the field, says Nanak, and they have a hundred masters to please.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੀਨੑੈ ਆਪੁ ਸਾਜਿਓ ਆਪੀਨੑੈ ਰਚਿਓ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapeenai aap saajio aapeenai rachio naau |
lines.english: He Himself created Himself; He Himself assumed His Name.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਯੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸਾਜੀਐ ਕਰਿ ਆਸਣੁ ਡਿਠੋ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: duyee kudarat saajeeai kar aasan ddittho chaau |
lines.english: Secondly, He fashioned the creation; seated within the creation, He beholds it with delight.
Seated within the creation, You behold it with delight. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਜਾਣੋਈ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇ ਲੈਸਹਿ ਜਿੰਦੁ ਕਵਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: toon jaanoee sabhasai de laiseh jind kavaau |
lines.english: You are the Knower of all; You give life, and take it away again with a word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤਾ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਤੂੰ ਤੁਸਿ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: daataa karataa aap toon tus deveh kareh pasaau |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Giver and the Creator; by Your Pleasure, You bestow Your Mercy.
True are Your actions, and all Your deliberations.
True are Your realms, True is Your creation.
True are Your worlds, True are Your solar Systems.
Salok, First Mehl:
True is Your Mercy, True is Your Insignia.
True is Your Command, and True is Your Court.
True is the Command of Your Will, True is Your Order.
Hundreds of thousands and millions call You True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਭਿ ਤਾਣਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਭਿ ਜੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabh taan sachai sabh jor |
lines.english: In the True Lord is all power, in the True Lord is all might.
True is Your Praise, True is Your Adoration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੇ ਸੁ ਕਚੁ ਨਿਕਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo mar jame su kach nikach |1|
lines.english: Those who are subject to birth and death are totally false. ||1||
O Nanak, true are those who meditate on the True One.
True is Your almighty creative power, True King.
Great is His greatness, as permanent as His Throne.
First Mehl:
Great is His greatness, as great as His Name.
Great is His greatness, as True is His justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਜਾ ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: vaddee vaddiaaee jaa puchh na daat |
lines.english: Great is His greatness, as He gives without being asked.
Great is His greatness, as He understands all our affections.
Great is His greatness, as He knows our utterances.
Great is His greatness, as He Himself is all-in-all.
Whatever He has done, or will do, is all by His Own Will. ||2||
O Nanak, His actions cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ਲਏ ਇਕਨੑਾ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਕਰੇ ਵਿਣਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa hukam samaae le ikanaa hukame kare vinaas |
lines.english: By His Command, some are merged into Him, and some, by His Command, are destroyed.
Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਸਚੈ ਕੀ ਹੈ ਕੋਠੜੀ ਸਚੇ ਕਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag sachai kee hai kottharree sache kaa vich vaas |
lines.english: This world is the room of the True Lord; within it is the dwelling of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਵ ਭਿ ਆਖਿ ਨ ਜਾਪਈ ਜਿ ਕਿਸੈ ਆਣੇ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: ev bhi aakh na jaapee ji kisai aane raas |
lines.english: No one can say who will be rescued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਭਾਣੈ ਕਢਿ ਲਏ ਇਕਨੑਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa bhaanai kadt le ikanaa maaeaa vich nivaas |
lines.english: Some, by the Pleasure of His Will, are lifted up out of Maya, while others are made to dwell within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh jaaneeai jaa kau aap kare paragaas |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone is known as Gurmukh, unto whom the Lord reveals Himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਸਚੇ ਹੀ ਸਚਿ ਨਿਬੜੈ ਚੁਣਿ ਵਖਿ ਕਢੇ ਜਜਮਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: othai sache hee sach nibarrai chun vakh kadte jajamaaliaa |
lines.english: There, only the Truth is judged true; the sinners are picked out and separated.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਲਿਖਿ ਨਾਵੈ ਧਰਮੁ ਬਹਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jeea upaae kai likh naavai dharam bahaaliaa |
lines.english: O Nanak, having created the souls, the Lord installed the Righteous Judge of Dharma to read and record their accounts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਇ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਜਿਣਿ ਗਏ ਹਾਰਿ ਗਏ ਸਿ ਠਗਣ ਵਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: terai naae rate se jin ge haar ge si tthagan vaaliaa |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with Your Name win, while the cheaters lose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਉ ਨ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਮੁਹ ਕਾਲੑੈ ਦੋਜਕਿ ਚਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: thaau na paaein koorriaar muh kaalai dojak chaaliaa |
lines.english: The false find no place there, and they go to hell with their faces blackened.
Wonderful is the sound current of the Naad, wonderful is the knowledge of the Vedas.
The Lord installed the Righteous Judge of Dharma to read and record the accounts. ||2||
Salok, First Mehl:
Wonderful are the beings, wonderful are the species.
Wonderful are the beings who wander around naked.
Wonderful are the forms, wonderful are the colors.
